checks.expected_outcome: A write using a different scope identity is rejected and leaves no row.
Admission without an effective rights assignment is rejected and creates no evidence identity.
Admission without an effective retention assignment is rejected and creates no evidence identity.
A candidate observation cannot resolve through a citation handle before accepted admission.
A second evidence identity for the same accepted admission is rejected and exactly one identity remains.
Raw-support input containing a path, URI, bucket, signed URL, or reversible locator is rejected.
UPDATE and DELETE against protected evidence and audit relations are rejected and original rows remain unchanged.
A consequential write without its same-transaction audit pair fails before commit.
